name: Daqian Ecology&Environment Group Co.,Ltd.
summary: Daqian Ecology&Environment Group Co.,Ltd. provides landscape architecture design services. It offers ecological landscape design and construction, ecological environment, tourism, cultural construction, and environment operation, as well as sculpture art services. The company was formerly known as Daqian Ecology & Landscape Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Daqian Ecology&Environment Group Co.,Ltd. in January 2018. Daqian Ecology&Environment Group Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1988 and is based in Nanjing, China.
